CONTENT.Club career: Brancolini is a youth product of Modena, and joined the youth academy of ACF Fiorentina in 2017. Brancolini made his professional debut with Fiorentina in a 4–0 Serie A win over Bologna on 29 June 2020.On 5 June 2022, Brancolini signed a five-year contract with Lecce.In August 2024, Brancolini joined Empoli on a three-year contract.

SUMMARY: Federico Brancolini (born 14 July 2001) is an Italian professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Serie A club Empoli.
